title: Email Marketing with AI
shortDescription: Master AI-powered email marketing to boost opens, clicks, and conversions. Learn strategy, copywriting, segmentation, testing, and automation.
longDescription: Transform your email marketing with AI. This comprehensive course teaches you how to leverage ChatGPT and AI tools to create high-performing email campaigns that drive real business results. Perfect for marketers, business owners, and entrepreneurs who want to maximize email ROI. Learn proven strategies for writing compelling copy, segmenting audiences, A/B testing, and building automated workflows that convert on autopilot. By the end of this course, you'll have the skills to generate 320% more revenue from email, recover abandoned carts, and build subscriber relationships that last. Includes 100+ email templates, subject line swipe files, and AI prompts to accelerate your success.

modules.title: Email Marketing Strategy with AI
modules.description: Build data-driven email strategies using AI tools. Master audience research, segmentation, and campaign planning for maximum ROI.
learningObjectives: Understand email marketing fundamentals and AI's role
Choose the right AI tools for your business
Create detailed customer avatars with ChatGPT
Design strategic campaign plans using AI frameworks
Implement the 70-20-10 content balance

modules.title: AI-Powered Email Writing
modules.description: Write subject lines and body copy that convert using AI. Master proven frameworks, CTAs, and personalization techniques.
learningObjectives: Generate high-converting subject lines with AI
Use AIDA, PAS, and BAB copywriting frameworks
Craft irresistible CTAs that drive clicks
Personalize emails beyond first name
Optimize copy for mobile and readability

modules.title: Segmentation & Personalization
modules.description: Target the right people with the right message. Learn RFM segmentation, behavioral targeting, and dynamic content.
learningObjectives: Implement advanced segmentation strategies
Use RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) scoring
Set up behavioral triggers and targeting
Create dynamic personalized content blocks
Leverage AI for predictive segmentation

modules.title: A/B Testing & Optimization
modules.description: Systematically test and improve email performance. Learn what to test, how to analyze results, and scale winners.
learningObjectives: Design effective A/B tests with statistical significance
Test subject lines, CTAs, and email copy
Analyze results and declare winners confidently
Use AI to accelerate testing cycles
Implement multivariate testing strategies

modules.title: Email Automation Workflows
modules.description: Build automated sequences that convert 24/7. Master welcome series, cart recovery, and advanced workflow strategies.
learningObjectives: Create essential automation workflows
Recover 15-30% of abandoned carts
Design post-purchase upsell sequences
Build win-back campaigns for inactive subscribers
Use AI to optimize workflow performance

deliverables: 100+ Email Templates (subject lines, body copy, CTAs)
AI Prompts Master Library (100+ ChatGPT prompts)
Subject Line Swipe File (500+ proven examples)
prerequisites: Basic understanding of email marketing (helpful but not required)
Access to an email marketing platform (Mailchimp, HubSpot, etc.)
Email list or plan to build one
targetAudience: Anyone looking to improve email ROI

seoMetadata.metaTitle: Email Marketing with AI Course - Master AI-Powered Email Campaigns | AI Learn Hub
seoMetadata.metaDescription: Learn to write high-converting emails with AI. Master segmentation, automation, and testing. 100+ templates included. Boost email ROI by 320%. Enroll now for $19!
